title: Section — List of Subcontractor Trades / Bid Packages
description: Every trade with scope on the job, in CSI MasterFormat division order — the unit of buyout and subcontracting, and the index the workbook's trade list and per-trade budget pages are built from. Each trade carries a one-sentence scope summary, an empty notes column for the estimator, and the content that heads its budget page: exclusions, clarifications, and the relevant spec notes (required products/systems/vendors/certifications) with a link to the spec PDF.

masterformat_division.description: Primary division — the sort key for the trade list and all trade pages.

csi_divisions.description: All MasterFormat divisions/sections rolled into this package.

scope_summary.description: One-sentence summary of the trade's scope (shown in the trade list).

scope_item_ids.description: Scope rows assigned to this trade.

estimated_value.description: Rolled up from this trade's budget lines.

exclusions.description: Bullet exclusions shown at the top of the trade budget page and carried onto the ITB.

clarifications.description: Bullet clarifications shown at the top of the trade budget page and carried onto the ITB.

spec_notes.description: Relevant spec requirements for the trade: required products, systems, vendors, certifications, etc. — quoted/summarized with provenance.

spec_pdf_url.description: Link to the spec PDF (section) for this trade.

self_perform.description: True if intended to be self-performed rather than subcontracted, when stated.

bid_package_status.description: Buyout status as found in the documents; defaults unknown.

min_bidders_required.description: Owner-required number of bidders for this package, when stated.

notes.description: Empty by default — for the estimator to fill in the workbook.
